title: Youth without education will be permitted to work at election precincts
summary_full: In the future, young adults who have reached legal age but do not have a secondary education will also be eligible to serve as members of municipal election commissions, the Saeima decided on Thursday, May 14.
summary_public: In the future, young adults who have reached legal age but do not have a secondary education will also be eligible to serve as members of municipal election commissions, the Saeima decided on Thursday, May 14.
